text_original: I unsubscribe and they still are trying to pull out money on my account. They will try and rob you. for the last three days they been trying to pull money out of my account. Do not subscribe to they pro membership
text_zh: 我取消了订阅，但他们仍然试图从我的账户里扣钱。他们会试图抢走你的钱。在过去的三个月里，他们一直试图从我的账户里扣钱。千万不要订阅他们的 Pro 会员。
reply_original: Hi there! I am truly sorry for this frustrating experience. Please rest assured that Fantasia does not have the authority to pull money from your account directly; all billing and cancellations are managed entirely by Google Play.
reply_zh: 你好！对于这次令人沮丧的经历，我深表歉意。请放心，Fantasia 无权直接从您的账户中扣款；所有账单和取消操作均完全由 Google Play 管理。
